mapper.insert: insert into ess_device ( member_id, group_id, device_name, location, capacity_kw, device_type, status, install_date, latitude, longitude, nx, ny, is_main ) values ( #{member_id}, #{group_id}, #{device_name}, #{location}, #{capacity_kw}, #{device_type}, #{status}, #{install_date}, #{latitude}, #{longitude}, #{nx}, #{ny}, 'N' )
mapper.select: select * from ess_device where member_id = #{param1} order by device_id desc
SELECT device_id, member_id, device_name, location, capacity_kw, device_type, status, install_date, latitude, longitude, nx, ny FROM ess_device WHERE device_id = #{device_id}

SELECT d.device_id, d.member_id, d.group_id, d.device_name, d.location, d.capacity_kw, d.device_type, d.status, d.install_date, d.latitude, d.longitude, d.nx, d.ny, d.is_main, d.ess_capacity_kwh, d.current_charge_kwh, d.charge_efficiency, d.discharge_efficiency, d.electricity_rate,
g.group_name,
m.soc, m.record_time
FROM ess_device d
LEFT JOIN ess_device_group g ON d.group_id = g.group_id
LEFT JOIN monitoring m ON m.device_id = d.device_id AND m.record_time = ( SELECT MAX(m2.record_time) FROM monitoring m2 WHERE m2.device_id = d.device_id )
WHERE d.member_id = #{member_id}
ORDER BY d.device_id DESC
